languages.text: "Д-да, конечно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы все понимаем. И будем нести свое бремя до конца".

languages.text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."
languages.original_text: "Д-да, конечно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы все понимаем. И будем нести свое бремя до конца".

traits.locale_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

traits.locale_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "J-ja, natürlich. Wir verstehen, o himmlischer Gesandter. Und werden unsere Last bis zum bitteren Ende tragen."
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

languages.text: "Oui, bien sûr. Nous comprenons, ô Envoyé céleste. Et nous porterons notre fardeau jusqu'au bout."
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

languages.text: "是的，当然。我们明白了，天国特使我们将勇往直前"
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

languages.text: "S-sí, por supuesto. Lo entendemos, oh Enviado Celestial. Y llevaremos nuestra carga hasta el amargo final".
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

languages.text: 「はい、もちろんです。天の使者よ、我々は理解している。そして、私たちの重荷を最後まで背負うでしょう"
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."

languages.text: "Evet, elbette. Anlıyoruz, ey Cennet Elçisi. Ve yükümüzü acı sona kadar taşıyacağız."
languages.original_text: "Y-yes, of course. We understand, o Heavenly Envoy. And will carry our burden to the bitter end."
